ENTROPY_ORB.title: Entropy
ENTROPY_ORB.description: Orb: When a card is discarded, deal damage to the frontmost enemy. Gain Strength when evoked.

[gold]Passive:[/gold] When a card is discarded, deal [blue]{Passive}[/blue] damage to the frontmost enemy.
